zh.lifeSummary: 當Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois於1249年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆瓦倫斯時，他的父親Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III11246歲，母親Sibylle de Beaujeu29歲。他於1270年12月4日與Hippolyte de Bourgogne結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1329年2月27日在他的家鄉享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois于1249年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆瓦倫斯时，他的父亲Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III11246岁，母亲Sibylle de Beaujeu29岁。他于1270年12月4日与Hippolyte de Bourgogne结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1329年2月27日在他的家乡享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aymar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois was born in 1249, in Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III, was 11246 and his mother, Sibylle de Beaujeu, was 29. He married Hippolyte de Bourgogne on 4 December 1270. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 27 February 1329, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois est né en 1249, à Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III, avait 11246 ans et sa mère, Sibylle de Beaujeu, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Hippolyte de Bourgogne le 4 décembre 1270. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 février 1329, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois 1249 in Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III 11246 und seine Mutter Sibylle de Beaujeu 29. Er hat am 4. Dezember 1270 Hippolyte de Bourgogne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Februar 1329 im Alter von 80 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois è nato il nel 1249 nel Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III, aveva 11246 anni e il suo madre, Sibylle de Beaujeu, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Hippolyte de Bourgogne il 4 dicembre 1270. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 febbraio 1329, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinoisが1249年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメベレンスで生まれた時，父Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois IIIは11246歳，母Sibylle de Beaujeuは29歳であった。1270年12月4日にHippolyte de Bourgogneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1329年2月27日に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois(이)가 1249년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 발스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III(은)는 11246세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibylle de Beaujeu(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1270년 12월 4일 Hippolyte de Bourgogne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1329년 2월 27일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois nasceu em 1249, em Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III, tinha 11246 anos e sua mãe, Sibylle de Beaujeu, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Hippolyte de Bourgogne em 4 de dezembro de 1270. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de fevereiro de 1329, em sua cidade natal, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois родился в 1249 г. в местности веиленс, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III было 11246 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibylle de Beaujeu, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Hippolyte de Bourgogne 4 декабря 1270 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 февраля 1329 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Aymar IV de Poitiers-Valentinois nació en 1249, en Valence, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Aymar de Poitiers-Valentinois III, tenía 11246 años y su mamá, Sibylle de Beaujeu, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Hippolyte de Bourgogne el 4 de diciembre de 1270. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de febrero de 1329, en su pueblo, a la edad de 80 años.
